entries.title: First post.
entries.summary: Let's see how this turns out
entries.body: Welcome to that werid part of the internet that gets to be my brain. Its like a kalidoscope of shiney objects. Enjoy!

entries.title: The_Orc
entries.summary: Play as a Orc and slay as many enemies and bathe in their blood as you fight your way to the to free your tribe from the clutches of a hell bent wizard.

entries.title: Lisp Tool Library
entries.summary: A comprehesive library of tools to use with LISP/Scheme like languages. It is especially usefule while doing the 2011, UC Berkeley Computer Science 61A videos lectures and materials.

entries.title: SweetSweet
entries.summary: This is the main contents of my game in a reuse form. A future library? Framework? Wrapper? sometihng, but when someone askes you what you coded your game in you can say sweetsweetLove
